description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a boxy, rectangular form and a brown outer casing. The front features a large, curved glass screen, flanked on the right by two prominent rotary dials and a speaker grille below them. The back of the television is black, with visible ventilation slats, a protruding cathode ray tube housing, and a metal antenna extending upward. The sides are smooth and unadorned, matching the brown color of the main body. The overall design is utilitarian, with a sturdy build and retro aesthetic typical of mid-20th-century consumer electronics.
description: A vintage brown television with a large curved screen, rotary dials, and a metal antenna, featuring a boxy retro design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large curved screen, two rotary dials, and speaker grille on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth brown casing and the depth of the television.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the black back panel, ventilation slats, cathode ray tube housing, and metal antenna.
description_view_3: Right side view with the same smooth brown casing as the left, showing the television's thickness.
attribute_bezel_design: thick brown plastic bezel with rounded edges and a matte finish
attribute_control_button_layout: two rotary dials and a speaker grille on the front right side in a vertical cluster
